289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

413.issue_title: refactor: Redesign Error DTOs and segregate BaseToolOutput concerns

cycles.name: C_SCHEMA

deliverables.description: Define BaseErrorOutput with is_error property, remove success/error_message fields from error and success DTOs, and delete CacheErrorOutput.

cycles.exit_criteria: Refactored schemas in error_outputs.py and tool_outputs.py with all tests passing in tests/schemas/

cycles.name: C_SERVER

deliverables.description: Update server.py and text_presenter.py to evaluate status via type check against BaseErrorOutput.

cycles.exit_criteria: Server and presenter layers refactored to use isinstance status checking and tested.

cycles.name: C_TOOLS

deliverables.description: Refactor tool classes execution and type signatures to only return success DTOs.

cycles.exit_criteria: Core tool execution methods raise exceptions instead of returning error DTOs.

cycles.name: C_DECORATORS

deliverables.description: Decorator pipeline refactored to capture core exceptions and return mapped error DTOs.

cycles.exit_criteria: Decorators catch exceptions and map them to error DTOs.

cycles.name: C_TESTS

deliverables.description: Remove/refactor legacy assertions on error DTO fields success and error_message throughout the test suite.

cycles.exit_criteria: Test suite assertions refactored to verify type safety and structured fields, and all tests pass.
